items.name: Knights of the Splintered Skies: Hydrian Elixir
items.description: Over the centuries, many have wondered how the KoSS descend upon the realm in times of peril. Only but a few know, the true source of the KoSS' power. The Hydrian Elixir grants the KoSS the ability to grow wings and fly for a short period of time. Not only does the elixir give them the ability of flight, but also increases their strength twofold and the wings attack anyone that get near them!

items.name: Ocherous Katana of the Setting Sun
items.description: I am anti-life, the beast of judgement. I am the dark at the end of everything. The end of universes, gods, worlds... of everything. And what will you be then, Dreamlord?

items.name: Firin' mai Tie!
items.description: Ima firin' mai Tie!  See that's funny because the tie looks like it's on fire.  Maybe it got hit with a laser?  Maybe you just stood too close to the campfire... Wait, why were you wearing a tie at a campfire.  Seems a bit too formal.

items.name: Year of the Dragon Lantern
items.description: Light the lantern to invoke the protection of the ancient dragon spirits.  If anyone is foolish enough to attack you while you are surrounded by dragon spirits, well then maybe they get what they deserve.

items.name: Dauntless Oni Mask of Noxious Origins
items.description: This magical oni mask, adorned with poisonous hues and intricate patterns, possesses an aura of mystique that both allures and repels those who behold its deadly beauty.

items.name: SIUNES Graphic Zip Hoodie Ember Edition
items.description:
A bold cropped zip hoodie in deep ember brown, featuring signature SIUNES graphics, embroidered flame motifs, and vibrant branded detailing. The glossy finish and premium stitching create a high-end streetwear look that elevates any outfit. Artistic, edgy, and unmistakably SIUNES.

🔗 SIUNES: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=SIUNES&CreatorType=Group

items.name: Knights of the Seventh Sanctum : Dual Duel Axes
items.description: You're dueling.  Your opponent has an axe... but you have two!  Wield the unholy relics of the Seventh Sanctum and no one else stands a chance... unless they have these axes too.  But how likely is that?

items.name: TH Monogram Hat
items.description:
The new mark of distinction. Inspired by our heritage, but designed for tomorrow — our Monogram is a modern take on a time-honoured icon. The all-over jacquard monogram features a stitched outline that adds a soft, slightly quilted texture to this classic bucket hat. 

This is a collectable item. 

First drop available on 9-11-22 from 7:30 pm EDT until 9:30 pm EDT Second drop available on 9-12-22 from 4:30 pm UTC until 6:30 pm UTC.
